title: oreoselinum pyrenaeum
intro: Oreoselinum pyrenaeum, also known as Pyrenean angelica or Oreoselene, is a perennial plant native to the Pyrenees mountains, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oreoselinum pyrenaeum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an expectorant, making it useful for respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
